meaning: adj.有灵感的,给予灵感的,灵感的
examples: She can speak with an eloquence that is almost inspirational.
He is a mountain climber, an inspirational speaker and an advocate for the disabled.
Schools minister Jim Knight said all the best schools had one thing in common, "a strong, inspirational head".
Some workers find the artworks inspirational, and some have yet to feel the power of art.
